description_long: This advertising board features a rectangular, vertically-oriented display panel held upright by a wide, sturdy black base. The front side showcases a colorful printed advertisement for a coffee machine, with Spanish text and vibrant images of coffee pods and a beverage. The reverse side displays a complementary design, encouraging social media engagement and featuring product imagery and branding. The panel appears to be made of a lightweight, rigid material such as acrylic or plastic, while the base is likely a denser plastic or metal for stability. The overall design is sleek and modern, with clean lines and no visible illumination or electronic components. The board is freestanding and portable, suitable for placement on flat surfaces in high-traffic areas.
description: A freestanding advertising board with a printed coffee-themed poster, supported by a wide black base and designed for tabletop or floor use. The board features vibrant graphics and branding on both sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the coffee machine advertisement with colorful pods and Spanish text, supported by a black base.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thinness of the display panel and the depth of the sturdy black base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a social media-themed advertisement with product imagery and branding, also supported by the black base.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the slim profile of the panel and the base's support structure.
attribute_frame_design: frameless rigid panel with a wide, solid black base
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster for a coffee machine and related products
